  "findings": [
    "Missing GFCI protection in wet, kitchen, and garage locations",
    "Severe shock and electrocution hazard due to lack of ground-fault protection near water sources"
  ],
  "actions": [
    "De-energize affected circuits if immediate hazard exists, or schedule immediate replacement of standard receptacles with GFCI-protected devices",
    "Verify downstream protection if feed-through wiring is utilized from an upstream GFCI device or breaker"
  ],
  "rationale": "The absence of GFCI protection in wet locations, kitchens, and garages violates fundamental life-safety requirements of the National Electrical Code. Because the installation is in-service, this presents an immediate, critical shock hazard to occupants.",

    "NEC 406.4",
    "NEC 406.9"
  ]
